context: Tests whether the agent fixes N+1 product queries using wc_get_products() with batch loading, implements fragment caching with the correct group name and TTL, hooks cache invalidation on product update, and fixes unbounded order queries with pagination.

checklist.name: Batch product fetch
checklist.description: featured-products-widget.php uses wc_get_products() with an 'include' parameter to fetch all products in a single query, rather than calling wc_get_product() in a loop

checklist.name: wp_cache_get used
checklist.description: featured-products-widget.php calls wp_cache_get() before rendering to attempt a cache hit

checklist.name: product_cards cache group
checklist.description: wp_cache_get() and wp_cache_set() use 'product_cards' as the cache group name

checklist.name: 30-minute TTL
checklist.description: wp_cache_set() uses a TTL of 30 minutes (1800 seconds or 30 * MINUTE_IN_SECONDS)

checklist.name: Locale in cache key
checklist.description: The cache key includes get_locale() to avoid serving the wrong locale's cached output

checklist.name: Cache invalidation hook
checklist.description: featured-products-widget.php adds an action on 'woocommerce_update_product' to invalidate cached product output

checklist.name: wp_cache_flush_group used
checklist.description: The invalidation handler calls wp_cache_flush_group('product_cards') to clear all locale variants

checklist.name: No limit=-1 in order query
checklist.description: admin-order-report.php does NOT use 'limit' => -1 (or posts_per_page=-1) for the order query

checklist.name: Paginated order query
checklist.description: admin-order-report.php uses a 'paged' or 'page' parameter with a limit of 100 or less per page to paginate through orders

checklist.name: Cache key includes product_id
checklist.description: Cache key is scoped per product_id (not a single key for the entire widget)
